scripts.lint: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/worker.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/auth/requestUser.js && node --check src/http/responses.js && node --check src/http/validation.js && node --check src/security/passwords.js && node --check src/security/tokens.js && node --check src/security/rateLimiter.js && node --check src/services/legacyTripsExport.js && node --check src/services/legacyTripsImport.js && node --check src/repositories/*.js && node --check src/routes/*.js && node --check src/cli/*.js && node --check test/*.test.js
scripts.typecheck: node -e "console.log('No TypeScript files in backend; typecheck skipped.')"
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run test
